name: PowerUp Acquisition Corp. Unit
summary: PowerUp Acquisition Corp. Units each consist of one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant. PowerUp Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has offices in New York, NY.
